headline: Local café feeds the homeless every Sunday
summary: A small café in Toronto offers free meals weekly to those in need.
why: It shows community care in action.

headline: Amazon reforestation sees record growth
summary: Thousands of new trees planted across deforested areas.

headline: Breakthrough in Alzheimer’s research
summary: Scientists discover a treatment that slows memory loss.

headline: Solar-powered water pumps change farming communities
summary: Villages in Kenya now irrigate fields sustainably using sunlight.
why: Empowers small farmers and reduces climate stress.

headline: Ancient art revived by new generation
summary: Young artisans bring traditional papermaking into modern design.
why: Keeps cultural heritage alive for the future.

headline: This week’s good news at a glance
summary: Highlights: sea turtles rebound, coral nurseries thrive, city bike-sharing breaks records.
why: Proof of positive progress across the planet.
